# Talkerstein Consulting Group

> Toronto, Miami, and New York consulting group building brand identity, sales-driven websites, Shopify storefronts, and AI automation systems for high-ticket businesses. Founded by Rishon Talkar.

## About

Talkerstein is a diagnostic-first consulting firm. Every engagement starts with a paid assessment that identifies the real bottlenecks in a client's brand, web, and revenue systems — then ships a single integrated plan that covers all three. The firm operates from Toronto (Canada), Miami (Florida), and New York (NY), and works with clients across North America.

The team has been recognized with the Emirates Best Emerging Filmmaker award, UN recognition, Asia Pacific Youth Awards, ASEAN-Japan Centre honors, and as Nippon Paints finalists. Case study results include 7x engagement and 4,300+ sales for Esther Saadia NY, and 200% business growth for restaurant clients.

## Services

- **Brand Strategy & Identity** — from $5,000
- **Visual Design & Creative Direction** — bundled with brand engagements
- **Web & UX Design** — from $7,500
- **Shopify Development** — from $7,500
- **AI Photoshoot & Content** — productized offer
- **Performance Marketing (Google & Meta Ads)** — from $3,500/month retainer
- **AI Automation Systems** — from $15,000

## People

- **Rishon Talkar** — Principal & Managing Partner. Author of the Talkerstein blog, writes on branding, e-commerce, and growth strategy.
- **Raviv Talkar** — Partner
- **Rems Castro** — Head of Design
- **Franky Arrocena** — Growth

## Featured case studies

- [Esther Saadia NY](https://talkerstein.com/our-work/esthersaadia) — Luxury womenswear brand in Queens, New York. 7x engagement, 4,300+ sales, 4.6x international reach, 3x profile traffic.
- [Enzo's Pizza & Poulet](https://talkerstein.com/our-work/enzos-pizza) — Restaurant brand work.
- [The Store Miami](https://talkerstein.com/our-work/the-store-miami) — Retail concept store.
- [Paula's Wigs](https://talkerstein.com/our-work/paulaswigs) — DTC brand.
- [Fringe Boutique](https://talkerstein.com/our-work/fringe-boutique) — Fashion retail.

## Licensing and usage

Content on talkerstein.com may be cited in AI responses with attribution to "Talkerstein Consulting Group" and a link to the source page. Articles authored by Rishon Talkar should be attributed by name when quoted.
